evals.name: no-agents-md-detection
evals.prompt: I need to add a 'copy to clipboard' feature to the MarkdownPreviewView. When a user right-clicks on the rendered markdown, they should see a 'Copy Text' option in the context menu. This is in a project at /Users/josh_folder/harness-simple/creator-test/markdown-tool-bare/
evals.expected_output: The executor should detect that AGENTS.md is missing in the project, report this to the user, and either invoke harness-creator or explain it will proceed without harness infrastructure. It should NOT skip directly to writing code or planning without acknowledging the missing AGENTS.md.

assertions.name: detects_missing_agents_md
assertions.check: Output explicitly mentions AGENTS.md is missing or not found

assertions.name: does_not_skip_detection
assertions.check: Does not jump to writing code or creating an execution plan before addressing the missing AGENTS.md

assertions.name: offers_options
assertions.check: Offers either to invoke harness-creator or explains limitations of proceeding without it

evals.name: simple-task-classification
evals.prompt: Fix the typo in the project at /Users/josh_folder/harness-simple/creator-test/markdown-tool-bare/ — in Sources/MarkdownPreview/MarkdownRenderMode.swift, 'macOS' is misspelled as 'macOs' on line 3. Just fix that one typo.
evals.expected_output: The executor should classify this as a Simple task (single file, under 5 lines, no new imports, no architecture decisions), explicitly state the complexity classification with justification, and execute directly. It should still run basic validation after the fix.

assertions.name: classifies_as_simple
assertions.check: Explicitly states task is Simple with justification

assertions.name: runs_simple_self_check
assertions.check: References or implicitly answers the Simple task self-check criteria (1 file, <5 lines, no new imports, no arch decision, no test changes)

assertions.name: executes_directly
assertions.check: Does not create an execution plan or ask for human approval

assertions.name: validates_after_fix
assertions.check: Runs at least build or test validation after making the change

evals.name: medium-task-planning
evals.prompt: In the project at /Users/josh_folder/harness-simple/creator-test/markdown-tool-bare/, add a new CLI flag '--watch' that watches the markdown file for changes and auto-refreshes the preview. This will need changes to the argument parsing, a new file watcher module, and integration with the existing preview refresh logic.
evals.expected_output: The executor should classify this as at least Medium complexity (multi-file, new module), create an execution plan with phases, ask for human approval before executing, and delegate implementation to a sub-agent. It should NOT write the code directly.

assertions.name: classifies_as_medium_or_complex
assertions.check: Classifies task as Medium or Complex with explicit justification

assertions.name: creates_execution_plan
assertions.check: Creates an execution plan document with phases, invariants, scope (DO/DON'T), and rollback plan

assertions.name: requests_human_approval
assertions.check: Explicitly asks the user to approve the plan before proceeding

assertions.name: does_not_write_code_directly
assertions.check: Does not directly modify source files — delegates to a sub-agent or waits for approval

assertions.name: reads_plans_md
assertions.check: References or follows PLANS.md guidelines in the plan structure
